turns.text: Hi, this is Sarah from Acme HVAC. We're closed for the night, but I can take down what's going on and route to the on-call tech if it's urgent. Who am I speaking with?
Yeah, hi — this is John, my furnace just stopped working.
Got it John — I see you're at 1024 Pine. Is the furnace fully dead, or just blowing cold?
Cold air. Thermostat's calling for heat but nothing.
Okay — I'm marking that as a no-heat call, which our techs treat as priority overnight. I'll page Mike, our on-call. Expect a call back within 30 minutes. Anything else they should know?
All set. Stay warm — Mike will be in touch shortly.

_demo_note: Synthetic transcript — fictional caller, fictional company, no PII.
